title: Two Sum
description: Given an array of integers and a target sum, return indices of two numbers that add up to the target.
hints: Use a HashMap to store complements

title: Valid Parentheses
description: Determine if a string containing only parentheses characters '(', ')', '{', '}', '[', ']' is valid.

title: Reverse a Linked List
description: Reverse a singly linked list iteratively or recursively.
hints: Track previous, current, and next nodes

title: Maximum Subarray Sum
description: Find the contiguous subarray with the largest sum using Kadane's algorithm.

title: Binary Search
description: Implement binary search on a sorted array to find the index of a target element.
hints: Watch for integer overflow in mid calculation

title: Merge Two Sorted Lists
description: Merge two sorted linked lists into one sorted linked list.

title: Contains Duplicate
description: Determine if an array contains any duplicate elements.

title: Valid Anagram
description: Check if two strings are anagrams of each other.

title: Climbing Stairs
description: Calculate the number of distinct ways to climb n stairs when you can take 1 or 2 steps at a time.
hints: Dynamic programming or recursion with memoization

title: Palindrome Number
description: Determine if an integer is a palindrome without converting it to a string.

title: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
description: Find the length of the longest substring without repeating characters using sliding window technique.

title: 3Sum
description: Find all unique triplets in an array that sum to zero.
hints: Use two pointers after fixing one element

title: Group Anagrams
description: Group strings that are anagrams of each other from a list of strings.

title: Binary Tree Level Order Traversal
description: Return the level order traversal of a binary tree's nodes (level by level, left to right).

title: Validate Binary Search Tree
description: Determine if a binary tree is a valid binary search tree.

title: Kth Largest Element in Array
description: Find the kth largest element in an unsorted array using quickselect or heap.

title: Course Schedule
description: Determine if you can finish all courses given prerequisites (detect cycle in directed graph).

title: Lowest Common Ancestor of Binary Tree
description: Find the lowest common ancestor of two nodes in a binary tree.
hints: Check if nodes are in left or right subtree

title: Product of Array Except Self
description: Return an array where each element is the product of all elements except itself, without using division.

title: Rotting Oranges
description: Find minimum time for all fresh oranges to rot using multi-source BFS on a grid.

title: Serialize and Deserialize Binary Tree
description: Design an algorithm to serialize a binary tree to a string and deserialize it back to the tree structure.

title: Median of Two Sorted Arrays
description: Find the median of two sorted arrays in O(log(min(m,n))) time using binary search.

title: Trapping Rain Water
description: Calculate how much water can be trapped after raining given an elevation map.

title: Word Ladder
description: Find the shortest transformation sequence from beginWord to endWord using a word list (BFS).

title: Longest Increasing Path in Matrix
description: Find the length of the longest increasing path in a matrix using DFS with memoization.

title: Regular Expression Matching
description: Implement regular expression matching with support for '.' and '*' using dynamic programming.

title: Merge K Sorted Lists
description: Merge k sorted linked lists into one sorted linked list using a min heap.

title: Alien Dictionary
description: Derive the order of characters in an alien language from a sorted dictionary using topological sort.

title: Sliding Window Maximum
description: Find the maximum element in each sliding window of size k using a deque.

title: Edit Distance
description: Find the minimum number of operations to convert one string to another using dynamic programming.
